original_hypothesis.title: Genesis.withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized Can Drain Unclaimed Agent Tokens
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized allows DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE to withdraw ANY ERC20 token from the Genesis contract after finalization, including the agent token backing unclaimed user distributions. The function only checks IERC20(token).balanceOf(this) >= amount, with no reservation for claimableAgentTokens obligations. Admin can withdraw all agent tokens, causing subsequent claimAgentToken calls to revert with insufficient balance.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The function lacks accounting for committed liabilities. While admin-only functions are trusted, this specific function should not be able to withdraw assets that back user claims — this is a code defect in the protection of user funds.

proof_of_signal.pattern: No check against sum(claimableAgentTokens) — admin can withdraw tokens backing user claims

preconditions: DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (FGenesis, controlled by ADMIN_ROLE) calls withdrawal

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: require(amount <= IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this))) — no subtraction of committed claimable amounts
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Admin calls withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized(to, agentTokenAddress, fullBalance) draining all agent tokens
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Admin extracts all unclaimed agent token value

economic_questions: What is the typical unclaimed agent token value per genesis?
How long do users typically take to claim?
Is the admin address controlled by a multisig?
validation_requirements: Confirm withdrawal of agent tokens succeeds even when claimable balances exist

potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Complete loss of agent token allocation
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Sum of all unclaimed agent tokens

investigation_priorities.parameter_analysis: Genesis finalization status and unclaimed balances
investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Test withdrawal of agent token when claimable > 0

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
